suppressedMessages.message:
Compilation Skipped: Use of incompatible library

This API returns functions which cannot be memoized without leading to stale UI. To prevent this, by default React Compiler will skip memoizing this component/hook. However, you may see issues if values from this API are passed to other components/hooks that are memoized.

C:\Users\Administrator\Documents\GitHub\Esparex\apps\admin\src\components\ui\DataTable.tsx:103:28
  101 |
  102 |     // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/incompatible-library -- TanStack Virtual uses controlled internal mutation and is intentionally isolated here.
> 103 |     const rowVirtualizer = useVirtualizer({
      |                            ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ TanStack Virtual's `useVirtualizer()` API returns functions that cannot be memoized safely
  104 |         count: data.length,
  105 |         getScrollElement,
  106 |         estimateSize,

suppressions.justification: TanStack Virtual uses controlled internal mutation and is intentionally isolated here.

suggestions.desc: Remove the console.warn().

suppressions.justification: diagnostic boundary: transient auth refresh failures are surfaced here

suppressedMessages.message: React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'initialFilters'. Either include it or remove the dependency array. If 'setFiltersState' needs the current value of 'initialFilters', you can also switch to useReducer instead of useState and read 'initialFilters' in the reducer.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [initialFilters, serializedFilters]

suppressedMessages.message: React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'initialPagination'. Either include it or remove the dependency array. If 'setPagination' needs the current value of 'initialPagination', you can also switch to useReducer instead of useState and read 'initialPagination' in the reducer.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [initialPagination, serializedPagination]
Remove the console.error().

suppressions.justification: infrastructure boundary: 5xx errors are surfaced for observability

suggestions.desc: Remove the console.warn().

suppressions.justification: infrastructure boundary: retry attempts are surfaced for debugging

suggestions.desc: Remove the console.error().

suppressions.justification: infrastructure boundary: network failures are surfaced for observability

suppressedMessages.message: React Hook useMemo has an unnecessary dependency: 'tick'. Either exclude it or remove the dependency array.

Compilation Skipped: Existing memoization could not be preserved

React Compiler has skipped optimizing this component because the existing manual memoization could not be preserved. The inferred dependencies did not match the manually specified dependencies, which could cause the value to change more or less frequently than expected. The inferred dependency was `setLoading`, but the source dependencies were [buildFilters, fetchPage, pageSize, query, selectedCategory, categories, sort, stableLocation, loadErrorMessage, logScope, urlLocationId, urlLocationLabel, urlRadiusKm]. Inferred different dependency than source.

  156 |    
  157 |   const fetchItems = useCallback(
> 158 |     async (requestedPage: number) => {
      |     ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
> 159 |       setLoading(true);
      | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
> 160 |       setError(null);
      …
      | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
> 186 |       }
      | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
> 187 |     },
      | ^^^^^^ Could not preserve existing manual memoization
  188 |     [
  189 |       buildFilters,
  190 |       fetchPage,
